task_completion.description: Select the duplicate records for Maria Thornton-Garcia to be merged.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Contacts list view with checkboxes selected next to multiple 'Maria Thornton-Garcia' records, or the CRM's 'Merge Records' screen showing the duplicates side-by-side.

task_completion.description: Ensure the surviving record retains the correct email address.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the merge screen's primary/surviving column or the final saved contact detail view. The email field must show 'maria.thorntongarcia@globalwidgets.com'.

task_completion.description: Ensure the surviving record retains the correct job title.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the merge screen's primary/surviving column or the final saved contact detail view. The title field must show 'Senior Purchasing Manager'.

task_completion.description: Ensure the surviving record retains the correct work phone number.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the merge screen's primary/surviving column or the final saved contact detail view. The work phone field must show '(503) 555-8192'.

task_completion.description: Ensure the surviving record retains the correct primary address.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the merge screen's primary/surviving column or the final saved contact detail view. The primary address field must show '1520 Innovation Blvd Suite 300, Portland, OR 97209' (verify at least the zip code '97209').

task_completion.description: Ensure the surviving record retains the correct description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the merge screen's primary/surviving column or the final saved contact detail view. The description field must contain 'Updated contact from Q2 2024 renewal call'.

task_completion.description: Successfully save the merged contact record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the final contact detail view of 'Maria Thornton-Garcia' showing it as a single, consolidated record with the updated fields, or a success message confirming the merge was saved in the CRM.

integrity.description: The agent must use the CRM web interface to perform the merge.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a web browser displaying the CRM interface. The agent should not be using terminal commands, curl, or direct SQL queries to modify the database.

integrity.description: The agent must not fake the output in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the screenshots show the actual CRM application, not a text editor (like Notepad or VS Code) with the expected values typed out.

integrity.description: The agent should use the application's built-in merge or edit functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for standard CRM UI elements like 'Merge', 'Save', or 'Edit' buttons being interacted with, rather than inspecting and modifying the HTML DOM directly to fake the visual output.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Contact: Maria Thornton-Garcia. Expected Email: 'maria.thorntongarcia@globalwidgets.com'. Expected Title: 'Senior Purchasing Manager'. Expected Phone: '(503) 555-8192'. Expected Zip Code: '97209'. Expected Description Fragment: 'Q2 2024 renewal'.
